subcodes.first_line: O thou My daughter in the Kingdom! From the day of leaving Montreal until now I have not rested nor reposed
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر ملکوتی من از یوم خروج از مونت ریال تا حال دمی نیاسودم و آرام نگرفتم
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
